# Vonga — Fan Intelligence Platform

> Vonga is a sports technology company that turns team merchandise into a fan data engine using NFC (Near Field Communication) technology. No app downloads required.

## What We Do

Vonga embeds NFC chips into sports merchandise — jerseys, hats, giveaway items — that fans tap with their phones. Each tap creates a first-party fan profile and captures engagement data that teams and sponsors can't get any other way.

## Products & Services

- **NFC-Powered Fan Profiles**: Every tap builds an anonymous-to-known fan identity. Teams learn who their most engaged fans are, not just how many walked through the gate.
- **Sponsor ROI Dashboards**: Real-time proof of sponsor activation effectiveness. Measurable engagement data that goes beyond impressions and logo placement.
- **Campaign Intelligence**: A/B test content, track fan journeys, and optimize experiences based on actual engagement — not surveys or estimates.
- **Tap Builder**: Visual tool for creating NFC-triggered fan experiences without code.

## Who We Serve

- **Sports teams** (professional and collegiate)
- **Universities and athletic departments**
- **Sports sponsors** seeking measurable ROI
- **Merchandise providers** (Fanatics, Legends, Aramark) as a platform partner

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2025
- Founder & CEO: Bill Riesner
- Headquarters: Indianapolis, Indiana, USA
- Technology: NTAG 424 DNA NFC chips with cryptographic authentication
- Pricing: Flat platform fee + per-chip cost. No per-tap charges. Unlimited taps.
- Stage: Pre-revenue, post-MVP

## How It's Different

- **Physical touchpoint**: Unlike digital-only platforms (apps, QR codes, surveys), Vonga works through merchandise fans already own and wear.
- **No app required**: Fans tap their phone on NFC-enabled merch. Works natively on iOS and Android.
- **First-party data**: Teams own the data. No third-party dependencies.
- **Sponsor proof**: Connects physical merchandise engagement directly to sponsor attribution.
